# ecom_microservices Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2026-03-04

## Active Technologies
- Python 3.12, TypeScript 5.x (Node.js 20+) + Django 5.x, Django REST Framework, Celery 5.x, Next.js 14+ (App Router), httpx, djangorestframework-simplejwt (001-mango-ecommerce-platform)
- PostgreSQL 16 (separate schema per service in dev, separate instances in prod), Redis 7+ (cache/sessions) (001-mango-ecommerce-platform)
- [e.g., Python 3.11, Swift 5.9, Rust 1.75 or NEEDS CLARIFICATION] + [e.g., FastAPI, UIKit, LLVM or NEEDS CLARIFICATION] (001-mango-ecommerce-platform)

## Project Structure

```text
backend/
frontend/
tests/
```

## Commands

cd src; pytest; ruff check .
